=========================================
MV LAKER – SUPRAMAX – OPENING @DAKAR-SENEGAL – END JANUARY
PREF. INDEX LINKED PERIOD BIZ.
Rus/Ukr
,
Goa transit
,

LSMGO: ABT 150-250 MT

190.0 M / 32.26 M

H&M: SWEDISH CLUB
IN LADEN
11.50 Kn / 23 MT VLSFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO
IN BALLAST
11.50 Kn / 21 MT VLSFO + 0.1 MT LSMGO
AT PORT IDLE : ABT 3.5 MT VLSFO + 0.1MT LSMGO
WORKING : ABT 4.25 MT VLSFO 380 + ABT 0.1MT LSMGO
ALL SPEED/CONSUMPTION FIGURES ARE TO BE CONSIDERED AS ABOUT (+/- 0.5KNOT FOR SPEED AND +/- 5% FORCONSUMPTION) ARE ALWAYS SUBJECT TO GOOD WEATHER WHICH IS DEFINED AS NO ADVERSE CURRENT A/O NEGATIVE INFLUENCE OF SWELL A/O MODERATE SEA, WIND NOT EXCEEDING BEAUFORT FORCE 4 (FOUR) A/O DOUGLES SEA STATE 3 (THREE). PERIODS OF WEATHER EXCEEDING THE ABOVE DESCRIBED GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS ARE TO BE EXPRESSELY EXCLUDED FROM THE EVALUATION OF VESSELS PERFORMANCE. NO EXTRAPOLATIONS TO BE MADE FOR WEATHER/SEA CONDITIONS OTHER THAN THOSE DESCRIBED ABOVE.CHARTERERS TO SUPPLY FIRST CLASS QUALITY BUNKERS STRICTLY COMPLYING WITH ISO 8217-2005(E), ENABLING MAIN ENGINE AND GENERATOR ENGINES TO OPERATE WITHOUT ANY HARMFULL EFFECTS.
BUNKER SPECS : IFO GRADE 380 CST RMG 35 ISO 8217- 2005(E) MDO GRADE DMA/DMB ISO 8217 - 2005(E) VESSEL HAS LIBERTY TO USE MGO WHEN MANOUVERING, PASSING NARROW STRAITS, CANALS , CONFINED RESTRICTED WATERS AND EXTREMELY COLD WEATHER. IN CASE CHARTERERS SUPPLY LOW SULPHUR MGO (DMA) FOR TRADING TO ECA + EU ZONES THE VISCOSITY TO BE MINIMUM 2-6 CST AT 40 DEGREES CELCIUS. BUNKER TESTING TO BE ORGANIZED BY OWNERS/MANAGERS BUT COST ALWAYS TO BE FOR CHRTS ACCOUNT.
ALL DETS ARE ABOUT.
PLSD TO HEAR!
